info.name: SyRide Admin Dashboard API
info.description: Complete collection for SyRide Admin Dashboard endpoints including Auth, Dashboard BFF, Wallet, Reports, and Verifications.

item.name: Auth

request.description:
Authenticate as an admin. On success, access_token and refresh_token are saved automatically to collection variables.

Returns:
- tokens.access_token
- tokens.refresh_token
- admin.type (primary | sycash)
- admin.email, name, phone

originalRequest.description:
Authenticate as an admin. On success, access_token and refresh_token are saved automatically to collection variables.

Returns:
- tokens.access_token
- tokens.refresh_token
- admin.type (primary | sycash)
- admin.email, name, phone

Authenticate as an admin. On success, access_token and refresh_token are saved automatically to collection variables.

Returns:
- tokens.access_token
- tokens.refresh_token
- admin.type (primary | sycash)
- admin.email, name, phone

response.name: 422 – Validation Error

originalRequest.description:
Authenticate as an admin. On success, access_token and refresh_token are saved automatically to collection variables.

Returns:
- tokens.access_token
- tokens.refresh_token
- admin.type (primary | sycash)
- admin.email, name, phone

request.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token. New access_token is saved automatically.

originalRequest.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token. New access_token is saved automatically.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token. New access_token is saved automatically.

request.description: Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated admin. Requires a valid access token.

originalRequest.description: Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated admin. Requires a valid access token.

item.description: Admin authentication endpoints (public — no token required)

item.name: Dashboard – BFF

request.description:
BFF mega-payload. Returns all four widget datasets in a single round-trip:
- stats (KPI cards)
- growth_chart (bar chart, last 6 months)
- city_distribution (horizontal bars)
- recent_activities (activity table)

originalRequest.description:
BFF mega-payload. Returns all four widget datasets in a single round-trip:
- stats (KPI cards)
- growth_chart (bar chart, last 6 months)
- city_distribution (horizontal bars)
- recent_activities (activity table)

request.description: Widget refresh: returns only the five KPI stat cards without fetching other widget data.

originalRequest.description: Widget refresh: returns only the five KPI stat cards without fetching other widget data.

query.description: Number of months to include (1–12). Default: 6.

request.description:
Widget refresh: returns bar chart data (Completed Trips vs New Users) for the last N months.

Query params:
- months (integer, 1–12, default 6)

query.description: Number of months to include (1–12). Default: 6.

originalRequest.description:
Widget refresh: returns bar chart data (Completed Trips vs New Users) for the last N months.

Query params:
- months (integer, 1–12, default 6)

request.description: Widget refresh: returns user count grouped by Syrian governorate (top 6), with percentage of total.

originalRequest.description: Widget refresh: returns user count grouped by Syrian governorate (top 6), with percentage of total.

query.description: Number of rows to return (1–50). Default: 10.

request.description:
Widget refresh: returns the latest N booking activity rows for the activity table.

Query params:
- limit (integer, 1–50, default 10)

response.name: 200 – Recent Activities

query.description: Number of rows to return (1–50). Default: 10.

originalRequest.description:
Widget refresh: returns the latest N booking activity rows for the activity table.

Query params:
- limit (integer, 1–50, default 10)

item.description: Dashboard widget endpoints. All require Bearer access token.

item.name: Wallet

request.description: Returns the authenticated admin's own wallet details (balance, wallet number, phone). Works for both primary and sycash admins.

originalRequest.description: Returns the authenticated admin's own wallet details (balance, wallet number, phone). Works for both primary and sycash admins.

request.description: Returns both admin wallets (primary + sycash) and all user wallets in the system.

response.name: 200 – All Wallets

originalRequest.description: Returns both admin wallets (primary + sycash) and all user wallets in the system.

request.description:
**Primary admin only.** Credits a user wallet by phone number.

Body:
- phone_number (string, 10–15 chars) — the user's wallet phone number
- amount (numeric, 1–1,000,000) — amount in SYP to add

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Credits a user wallet by phone number.

Body:
- phone_number (string, 10–15 chars) — the user's wallet phone number
- amount (numeric, 1–1,000,000) — amount in SYP to add

response.name: 404 – Wallet Not Found

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Credits a user wallet by phone number.

Body:
- phone_number (string, 10–15 chars) — the user's wallet phone number
- amount (numeric, 1–1,000,000) — amount in SYP to add

response.name: 422 – Validation Error

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Credits a user wallet by phone number.

Body:
- phone_number (string, 10–15 chars) — the user's wallet phone number
- amount (numeric, 1–1,000,000) — amount in SYP to add

request.description:
Returns paginated transaction history for a specific wallet by its database ID.

Path param:
- {walletId} — the wallet's integer ID (get from Get All Wallets)

originalRequest.description:
Returns paginated transaction history for a specific wallet by its database ID.

Path param:
- {walletId} — the wallet's integer ID (get from Get All Wallets)

Returns paginated transaction history for a specific wallet by its database ID.

Path param:
- {walletId} — the wallet's integer ID (get from Get All Wallets)

item.description: Admin wallet management. All require Bearer access token.

item.name: Reports [Primary Only]

query.description: Start of date range (Y-m-d). Optional — omit for all-time.
End of date range (Y-m-d, must be ≥ start_date). Optional.

request.description:
**Primary admin only.** Generates a financial report for the given date range.

Query params (both optional):
- start_date (Y-m-d)
- end_date (Y-m-d, must be ≥ start_date)

Omit both to get an all-time report.

response.name: 200 – Report

query.description: Start of date range (Y-m-d). Optional — omit for all-time.
End of date range (Y-m-d, must be ≥ start_date). Optional.

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Generates a financial report for the given date range.

Query params (both optional):
- start_date (Y-m-d)
- end_date (Y-m-d, must be ≥ start_date)

Omit both to get an all-time report.

response.name: 422 – Validation Error

query.description: Start of date range (Y-m-d). Optional — omit for all-time.
End of date range (Y-m-d, must be ≥ start_date). Optional.

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Generates a financial report for the given date range.

Query params (both optional):

- end_date (Y-m-d, must be ≥ start_date)

Omit both to get an all-time report.

item.description: Financial reporting endpoints. Restricted to the primary admin.

item.name: Verifications [Primary Only]

request.description:
**Primary admin only.** Returns all users whose verification_status is 'pending', with their uploaded documents.

Type is inferred from documents:
- Has license or mechanic_card → driver
- Otherwise → passenger

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Returns all users whose verification_status is 'pending', with their uploaded documents.

Type is inferred from documents:
- Has license or mechanic_card → driver
- Otherwise → passenger

request.description:
**Primary admin only.** Approves a pending verification request.

Path param:
- {userId} — the user's integer ID

If user has license/mechanic_card documents → verifies as driver (is_verified_driver = true).
Otherwise → verifies as passenger (is_verified_passenger = true).
Sets verification_status = 'approved'.

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Approves a pending verification request.

Path param:
- {userId} — the user's integer ID

If user has license/mechanic_card documents → verifies as driver (is_verified_driver = true).
Otherwise → verifies as passenger (is_verified_passenger = true).
Sets verification_status = 'approved'.

response.name: 422 – Not in Pending State

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Approves a pending verification request.

Path param:
- {userId} — the user's integer ID

If user has license/mechanic_card documents → verifies as driver (is_verified_driver = true).
Otherwise → verifies as passenger (is_verified_passenger = true).
Sets verification_status = 'approved'.

**Primary admin only.** Approves a pending verification request.

Path param:
- {userId} — the user's integer ID

If user has license/mechanic_card documents → verifies as driver (is_verified_driver = true).
Otherwise → verifies as passenger (is_verified_passenger = true).
Sets verification_status = 'approved'.

request.description:
**Primary admin only.** Rejects a verification request.

Path param:
- {userId} — the user's integer ID

Sets verification_status = 'rejected', is_verified_driver = false, is_verified_passenger = false.

originalRequest.description:
**Primary admin only.** Rejects a verification request.

Path param:
- {userId} — the user's integer ID

Sets verification_status = 'rejected', is_verified_driver = false, is_verified_passenger = false.

**Primary admin only.** Rejects a verification request.

Path param:
- {userId} — the user's integer ID

Sets verification_status = 'rejected', is_verified_driver = false, is_verified_passenger = false.

item.description: User verification management. Restricted to the primary admin.
